creator: owaki@st.rim.or.jp
text:
There is a typo in /etc/login.conf. Following line is found for
	'news' class.

	:datasize-curr=64M:\

	This line should be as follows.

	:datasize-cur=64M:\

Fix: Following patch (for 
	$Id: login.conf,v 1.9.2.3 1997/05/23 12:59:16 ache Exp $) will 
	fix this problem.
